markdown:
# Healer's Kit

A Healer's Kit has ten uses. As a [[utilize]] action, you can expend one of its uses to stabilize an [[unconscious]] creature that has 0 [[hit_points]] without needing to make a Wisdom ([[medicine]]) check.
